title_zh: 让长时间运行的NVIDIA TensorRT引擎构建在Python或C++中可观察和可取消
title_en: Make Long-Running NVIDIA TensorRT Engine Builds Observable and Cancelable in Python or C++
summary_zh: TensorRT引擎构建可能耗时从几秒到几分钟不等。大型强类型模型、深入的策略搜索以及在全新GPU型号上的冷启动时间缓存都是原因。
summary_en: A TensorRT engine build can take seconds to many minutes. Large strongly typed models, deep tactic search, and a cold timing cache on a brand-new GPU SKU contribute to this duration.
why_it_matters_zh: 使引擎构建过程可观察和可取消，有助于开发者监控进度和及时中断，提升开发效率和资源利用。
why_it_matters_en: Making the engine build process observable and cancelable helps developers monitor progress and abort if necessary, improving development efficiency and resource usage.

title_zh: 实时检测AI生成视频：压缩比特流中的 Anytime 检测方法
title_en: Detect Early, Escalate Rarely: Anytime Detection of AI-Generated Video from the Compressed Bitstream
summary_zh: 传统的AI生成视频检测方法在离线环境下对解码后的视频像素进行评分，通常使用大型视觉语言模型，计算开销高。本文提出将检测任务重新定义为流式感知，直接解析视频压缩编码中的运动场信息，避免了像素域的复杂前向传播。该方法可在任何时间点基于当前数据有效做出判断，且计算成本比像素卷积神经网络低五个数量级。实验证明，在GenVidBench和AIGVDBench数据集中，延迟检测15%的视频片段即可将准确率从0.75提升至0.78，同时计算成本降低7倍。该研究未引入新的检测器，核心贡献在于问题重新定义、两个理论保证及计算边界的测量。代码和实验配置公开可用。
summary_en: Current AI-generated video detectors operate offline by decoding clips to pixels and scoring once using large vision-language models, resulting in high computational cost. This work reframes detection as a streaming perception task by parsing motion fields already encoded in the compressed bitstream rather than performing pixel-domain forward passes. This approach supports anytime-valid thresholds enabling timely decisions, with monotone running aggregates and closed-form cost escalation. Experiments on GenVidBench show that the codec-based method achieves a full-length AUC of 0.64 with five orders of magnitude less computation than pixel CNNs on CPU. Deferring detection on 15% of clips increases accuracy from 0.75 to 0.78 with 7× less computation; results replicate on AIGVDBench. The contributions are conceptual reframing, two theoretical guarantees, and measured computational frontiers; no new detectors are introduced. Code and evaluation splits are publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 本文通过创新性的将AI视频检测任务视为流式感知问题，利用视频编码中的运动信息大幅降低计算成本，实现随时有效的判断策略。这种方式不仅提高了检测精度和计算效率，还提供了理论保证和实际的性能边界，为实时AI视频鉴别提供了新的思路和工具。
why_it_matters_en: By innovatively reframing AI-generated video detection as a streaming perception problem and exploiting motion fields embedded in video compression, this work significantly reduces computational cost and enables anytime-valid decision making. This approach improves accuracy and efficiency while providing theoretical guarantees and computational frontiers, offering a novel perspective and practical tools for real-time AI video detection.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Detect Early, Escalate Rarely: Anytime Detection of AI-Generated Video from the Compressed Bitstream. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 73.

title_zh: Crowd4D：场景感知的单目4D人群重建
summary_zh: 从单目视频中恢复大规模场景中一致的4D人群运动具有挑战性，主要因深度模糊和复杂场景几何。现有方法通常基于单平面假设，导致度量尺度不可靠且复杂地形下空间漂移。Crowd4D是首个场景感知的4D人群重建框架，能联合优化人群与场景，实现场景几何的显式融合，并通过多阶段优化策略保证图像与场景空间一致性。引入了人群-场景交互代理（HSIP），利用场景交互点云(SIPC)与交互曲面(SIS)作为中间表示，融合显式场景几何先验，重新定义优化空间。为增强遮挡下的时间稳定性，设计人群结构连贯正则化(CSCR)，利用HSIP空间先验对局部邻域的相对位移和方向施加软时间一致性约束。大量实验表明Crowd4D在复杂大规模场景中显著优于现有方法，实现稳健的单目4D人群重建。
summary_en: Recovering scene-consistent 4D crowd motion from monocular video in large-scale scenes is challenging due to depth ambiguity and complex geometry. Existing methods assume a single plane, resulting in unreliable scale and spatial drift. Crowd4D is the first scene-aware 4D crowd reconstruction framework jointly optimizing crowd and scene from monocular RGB videos. It explicitly incorporates scene geometry with a multi-stage optimization strategy to ensure consistency across image and scene spaces. The method introduces the Human-Scene Interaction Proxy (HSIP), derived from Scene Interaction Point Clouds (SIPC) and Scene Interaction Surface (SIS), encoding geometric priors and redefining the optimization space. To improve temporal stability under occlusions, the Crowd Structural Coherence Regularization (CSCR) imposes soft temporal consistency using HSIP-based spatial priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate Crowd4D's robust and superior performance in complex, large-scale real-world scenes.
why_it_matters_zh: Crowd4D的创新之处在于同时优化人群和场景，打破以往单平面假设的限制，引入详细的场景几何先验（HSIP）和结构连贯正则化（CSCR）来提升重建精度和时间稳定性，从而有效解决了大规模复杂场景下的单目4D人群重建难题。
why_it_matters_en: Crowd4D innovates by jointly optimizing crowd and scene, overcoming prior single-plane assumptions. By introducing detailed scene geometry priors (HSIP) and structural coherence regularization (CSCR), it improves reconstruction accuracy and temporal stability, effectively addressing monocular 4D crowd reconstruction challenges in large, complex scenes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Crowd4D: Scene-Aware Monocular 4D Crowd Reconstruction. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: FineServe：全球大型语言模型服务工作负载的细粒度数据集与特征分析
title_en: FineServe: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Characterization of Global LLM Serving Workloads
summary_zh: FineServe是一套从全球商业市场收集的多模型大型语言模型（LLM）服务工作负载数据集。该数据集支持对多样化模型和任务的真实服务动态进行细粒度分析，揭示了不同模型架构、规模及任务意图下的请求波动行为。基于此，研究人员开发了FineServe工作负载生成器，可生成定制化的细粒度模型感知工作负载，用于评估多模型服务平台的调度、路由及容量规划策略。数据集和工具已开源。
summary_en: FineServe is a fine-grained multi-model LLM serving workload dataset collected from a global commercial marketplace, enabling detailed characterization of real-world service dynamics across heterogeneous models and tasks. The analysis reveals distinct fluctuation patterns by model architecture, scale, and task intent. Building on these insights, a workload generator was developed to create configurable, model-aware workloads for benchmarking multi-model serving platforms. FineServe offers a realistic foundation for evaluating routing, scheduling, and capacity planning in LLM serving systems, and is publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 高效部署大型语言模型服务需理解真实世界工作的多样性和波动性，FineServe通过真实商业数据填补了现有研究使用代理或粗粒度数据的空白，促进了LLM服务系统的优化策略研究。
why_it_matters_en: Efficiently serving LLMs requires in-depth understanding of heterogeneous and fluctuating real-world workloads. FineServe fills the gap left by studies relying on proxy or coarse data by providing authentic, fine-grained data, thereby advancing research on optimizing LLM serving systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: FineServe: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Characterization of Global LLM Serving Workloads. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 用于稳健金融欺诈检测及对抗鲁棒性的混合LSTM-图神经网络框架
title_en: Hybrid LSTM-Graph Neural Framework for Robust Financial Fraud Detection and Adversarial Resilience
summary_zh: 本文针对金融机构在发现复杂洗钱模式（如分散交易和层级交易）中面临的数据极度不平衡和对抗性规避挑战，提出了FraudShield AI框架。该框架结合了长短期记忆网络（LSTM）与手工设计的图拓扑特征（包括PageRank中心性、入度动态和自定义流动比率），实现了从单笔交易分析向网络级取证的转变。采用Focal Loss解决类别不平衡问题，并引入动态阈值机制以增强对低值分散交易攻击的鲁棒性。基于PaySim数据集的实验证明，混合模型在精准率、召回率和F1值上显著优于逻辑回归和XGBoost，尤其在难以检测的微交易欺诈上表现突出。
summary_en: This paper addresses the challenges faced by financial institutions in detecting complex money laundering patterns like smurfing and layering amid extreme data imbalance and adversarial evasion tactics, by proposing FraudShield AI. The framework integrates Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks with handcrafted graph topological features such as PageRank centrality, in-degree dynamics, and a custom flow ratio, shifting analysis from isolated transactions to network-level forensics. A Focal Loss objective mitigates class imbalance, and dynamic thresholding improves resilience to low-value smurfing attacks. Experiments on the PaySim dataset show the hybrid model outperforms Logistic Regression and XGBoost in precision, recall, and F1-score, especially on hard-to-detect micro-transaction frauds.
why_it_matters_zh: 此框架创新性地结合了时间序列和网络拓扑分析，有效捕获洗钱行为的动态和结构特征，提升了检测微交易欺诈的能力，并通过抗不平衡及动态阈值设计增强模型的鲁棒性，应对金融欺诈中的对抗攻击。
why_it_matters_en: The framework innovatively combines temporal sequence modeling and network topology analysis to effectively capture dynamic and structural traits of money laundering activities, enhancing detection of micro-transaction frauds. The use of imbalance-aware loss and dynamic thresholding improves robustness against adversarial attacks, making it a significant advance for financial fraud detection.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Hybrid LSTM-Graph Neural Framework for Robust Financial Fraud Detection and Adversarial Resilience. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 63.

title_zh: 当推理限制了行动选择：大型语言模型游戏玩法中的多样性坍塌
title_en: When Reasoning Narrows the Move: Diversity Collapse in LLM Game Play
summary_zh: 本文探讨监督微调（SFT）对大型语言模型在序列决策任务中行为多样性的影响，基于井字棋变体的确定性棋盘游戏进行实验，发现推理模式常抑制动作多样性且并非总提高动作准确率。标准SFT虽然提升准确率，却引发过早的多样性坍塌。通过动作增强训练，即对每状态所有最优动作进行训练，可部分缓解该问题。研究指出模仿学习中狭窄支持度是策略坍塌源头，强调在SFT中保持动作多样性对探索行为的重要性。
summary_en: This paper investigates the effect of supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on behavioral diversity of large language models in sequential decision-making, using deterministic board games based on tic-tac-toe variants. The study finds that reasoning-mode generation often suppresses action diversity without consistently improving accuracy. Standard SFT improves accuracy but causes premature diversity collapse beyond the necessary accuracy-diversity tradeoff. Training on all optimal actions per state (action augmentation) partly mitigates this effect. The work identifies narrow-support imitation as a source of policy collapse and highlights preserving action diversity during SFT as crucial for maintaining exploration.
why_it_matters_zh: 理解和保持语言模型决策中的行为多样性，有助于避免策略早期收敛，提升模型在复杂任务中的探索能力和表现稳定性。本文提出的动作增强方法为训练流程设计提供新思路，意义重大。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding and preserving behavioral diversity in language model decision-making helps prevent premature policy convergence and enhances exploration and robustness in complex tasks. The proposed action augmentation approach offers a novel training strategy with important implications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: When Reasoning Narrows the Move: Diversity Collapse in LLM Game Play. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 63.

title_zh: 超越相关性检索：面向评分标准的文档集选择与排序
title_en: Beyond Relevance-Centric Retrieval: Rubric-Oriented Document Set Selection and Ranking
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型和AI代理成为搜索结果的主要使用者，文档集质量决定了下游生成的上限。现有评估体系仅独立评分文档并通过nDCG聚合，忽略了文档间的冗余、冲突和互补等交互，无法判定何种文档集更优。本文提出完整的评估-诊断-优化框架，设计了覆盖短长文本的三层九维文档集评估基准SetwiseEvalKit，包含约2.8万条高质量评分标准。系统评估12种重排序方法，发现最佳方法覆盖率不超过45%，跨文档协同指标普遍较弱，且无单一方法能在两种场景均保持顶级表现。基于此，提出无训练的Rubric4Setwise方法，将评分标准转换为文档集选择信号，实现更优下游生成效果，使用文档更少、搜索轮次更少，且在两种场景下均保持最新成果，验证了从评估到优化闭环的有效性。
summary_en: As large language models and AI agents become primary consumers of search results, the quality of document sets defines the upper bound for downstream generation. Existing evaluation systems score documents independently and aggregate via nDCG, ignoring inter-document interactions like redundancy, conflict, and complementarity, and cannot determine what makes one document set better than another. To tackle this, the paper proposes a complete evaluate-diagnose-optimize framework and designs SetwiseEvalKit, a three-level, nine-dimension evaluation benchmark with about 28K high-quality rubrics covering both short and long-form scenarios. Twelve rerankers were systematically evaluated, revealing that even the best achieve at most 45% coverage, cross-document coordination is weak, and no single method excels across both settings. Building on this, Rubric4Setwise, a training-free method converting rubric-based criteria into document set selection signals, achieves superior downstream generation with fewer documents and search rounds. It alone maintains state-of-the-art results across both scenarios, validating the effectiveness of closing the loop from evaluation to optimization.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破了传统仅关注单篇文档相关性的检索范式，系统考虑文档集内的交互关系，提出了全面且细致的评估标准和工具，大幅提升了文档集优化的理论与实践水平。Rubric4Setwise方法无需训练即可高效转换评估指标准确指导文档筛选，提升了生成任务效果，推动了搜索结果质量优化在AI生成领域的应用。
why_it_matters_en: This research goes beyond traditional retrieval focusing solely on individual document relevance by systematically considering interactions within document sets. It introduces comprehensive and detailed evaluation standards and tools, greatly advancing both theoretical and practical aspects of document set optimization. The training-free Rubric4Setwise method efficiently converts evaluation rubrics into accurate document selection signals, enhancing generation tasks and advancing the application of search result quality optimization in AI generation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Beyond Relevance-Centric Retrieval: Rubric-Oriented Document Set Selection and Ranking. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
